existing_features.title: Update the Location component to display the following three location entries under the 'Locations' heading: (1) Prinz Eugen Straße 48/ 1-2, 1040 Vienna, Austria; (2) Rua do Raio nº26, Braga, Portugal; (3) Off location, travel and via Zoom may be available upon request. Remove any previous location addresses (e.g. Cascais/Lisbon references).

Update the Location component to display named studio entries: 'Studio Belvedere' as the name for Prinz Eugen Straße 48/1-2, 1040 Vienna, Austria; 'Clinicus Natura' as the name for Rua do Raio nº26, Braga, Portugal; and 'Off location, travel and via Zoom may be available upon request' as a third unlabelled entry (no studio name). Each named entry should display the studio name prominently above its address.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update Locations section to show named locations: 'Studio Belvedere' (Prinz Eugen Straße 48/1-2, 1040 Vienna, Austria), 'Clinicus Natura' (Rua do Raio nº26, Braga, Portugal), and 'Off location, travel and via Zoom may be available upon request'
